summary: Completed frontend testing of Builder Workspace. All 13 features tested and working correctly. Two-panel layout (35%/65%), multi-agent AI conversation, device switcher, panel toggle, voice input, undo, and publish buttons all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Builder.jsx is well-structured with proper component separation (MessageBubble component)
Multi-agent conversation simulation works correctly with proper delays and state management
Device switcher correctly changes preview dimensions (mobile: 375x667, tablet: 768x600, desktop: full)
Panel toggle smoothly hides/shows the left sidebar with CSS transitions
Voice input uses Web Speech API with proper browser support detection
Undo functionality properly tracks history with historyIndex state
All 4 agent icons (Architect, Designer, Engineer, Reviewer) display with correct colors
Suggested prompts are clickable and populate the textarea correctly
seed_data_creation: Used test project ID: test-project-123 (creates placeholder project)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Builder Workspace fully functional. Multi-agent AI conversation is MOCKED (client-side simulation with delays). Project fetch may return 404 for non-existent projects but gracefully falls back to placeholder. Voice input requires browser support for Web Speech API.
